text: OpenML: Open Machine Learning As many fields of science have learned, using online tools to collect, order and relate data can make a huge difference when it comes to advancing the field. We describe OpenML, a new community that facilitates the sharing and (most importantly) the detailed description of datasets used in machine learning, and in that way makes research and communication more effective, visible and collaborative. We clarify the relation of OpenML to other forms of networked science and highlight the opportunities it presents for ML researchers, scientists, students and practitioners.
headline: Fully Human Written
